---
title: "William Butler Bourn"
---

## William Butler Bourn

**Dates:** (1798/9-1865)

### Description

partner in firm of John Parker, publishers

### Biography

[DLB]

### Letters

- Letter from Novr 24th 1862
- Letter from Novr 21st 1862
- Letter from Oct 16th [1862]
- Letter from June 10th 1861
- Letter from March 26th 1861
- Letter from Novr 22nd 1860
- Letter from Novr 20th [1860]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
